panels.description: Wide action shot: The battered Thunder Child, smoke trailing from its funnels and fire engulfing its middle, surges through a white sea toward a towering, tripod Martian, mid-day lighting.

bubbles.text: The Thunder Child charged, its engines screaming against the heat-ray.

panels.description: Dynamic action: A blinding explosion rips the ironclad apart, fire and metal hurling outward, the force of the blast crumpling the tripod Martian like paper, high contrast, dramatic shadows.
Medium close-up: My brother on the deck of a smaller vessel, face etched with shock and awe, mouth open as he looks toward the horizon.
Wide shot: A multitude of ships and boats in the background cheering and waving, foreground filled with billowing white steam hiding the wreckage.

bubbles.text: Frantic cheering rose from every vessel in sight.

panels.description: Interior shot: A cramped, dimly lit room in an abandoned house at Halliford, the narrator looking out a cracked window at the black smoke outside, tense atmosphere, claustrophobic lighting.

bubbles.text: Trapped in this island of daylight... where is she? Is she already mourning me?
